central_schemes.name: PMFBY
central_schemes.eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas

central_schemes.name: KCC
central_schemes.benefit: Subsidized crop loans at 4% interest (with prompt repayment). Up to ₹3 lakh limit

central_schemes.name: Soil Health Card
central_schemes.benefit: Free soil testing and nutrient recommendation card every 2 years

central_schemes.name: PM-KUSUM
central_schemes.full_name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan
central_schemes.benefit: 60% subsidy on solar pumps (up to 7.5 HP). Sell surplus solar power to grid

central_schemes.name: e-NAM
central_schemes.benefit: Sell crops online across 1,300+ mandis. Better price discovery, transparent bidding
central_schemes.eligibility: All farmers with Aadhaar and bank account

central_schemes.name: AIF
central_schemes.benefit: 3% interest subvention on loans up to ₹2 crore for farm infrastructure

central_schemes.name: PM Kisan Maan-Dhan
central_schemes.benefit: ₹3,000/month pension after age 60. Monthly contribution ₹55-200 based on age

rice.name: NFSM-Rice
rice.benefit: Subsidized seeds, INM/IPM demos, farm machinery. ₹500-1,000/ha for SRI technique

rice.name: MSP Guarantee
rice.benefit: MSP ₹2,300/quintal (2025-26). Government procurement at guaranteed price

wheat.name: NFSM-Wheat
wheat.benefit: Subsidized seeds, micro-nutrients, farm machinery support

wheat.name: MSP Guarantee
wheat.benefit: MSP ₹2,275/quintal (2025-26). Sold directly to FCI at guaranteed price

maize.name: NFSM-Coarse Cereals
maize.full_name: National Food Security Mission — Coarse Cereals
maize.benefit: Subsidized hybrid seeds, INM demos, sprinkler sets at 50% subsidy

cotton.name: TMC
cotton.benefit: Subsidized Bt cotton seeds, IPM kits, sprayers. HDP training programs

cotton.name: MSP Guarantee
cotton.benefit: MSP ₹7,121/quintal (medium staple). CCI procurement at MSP

sugarcane.name: FRP
sugarcane.benefit: FRP ₹340/quintal (2025-26). Mills legally bound to pay within 14 days

sugarcane.name: Drip Subsidy
sugarcane.benefit: 55-90% subsidy on drip irrigation for sugarcane. Saves 40% water

mango.name: MIDH
mango.full_name: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture
mango.benefit: ₹40,000/ha for mango plantation (40% subsidy). Free drip irrigation setup

banana.name: MIDH
banana.full_name: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture
banana.benefit: ₹87,500/ha for tissue culture banana (40% subsidy). Cold storage linkage

grapes.name: MIDH
grapes.full_name: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture
grapes.benefit: ₹1,00,000/ha subsidy for vineyard establishment. Export quality training

apple.name: MIDH
apple.full_name: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture
apple.benefit: ₹60,000/ha for apple orchards. Anti-hail net at 50% subsidy

orange.name: MIDH
orange.full_name: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture
orange.benefit: ₹40,000/ha for citrus plantation. Post-harvest pack-house subsidy

papaya.name: MIDH
papaya.full_name: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture
papaya.benefit: ₹30,000/ha for papaya cultivation. Tissue culture plant subsidy

coconut.name: Coconut Dev. Board
coconut.benefit: ₹40/seedling subsidy, ₹35,000/ha for replanting, copra procurement at MSP

coffee.name: Coffee Board Subsidy
coffee.benefit: ₹35,000/ha for replantation, quality upgradation, pool marketing support

lentil.name: NFSM-Pulses
lentil.benefit: Subsidized seeds, Rhizobium culture, INM/IPM kits. ₹3,000/ha cluster demos

chickpea.name: NFSM-Pulses
chickpea.benefit: Subsidized seeds (50% cost), weedicides, sprinkler sets. MSP ₹5,650/quintal

mungbean.name: NFSM-Pulses
mungbean.benefit: Subsidized certified seeds, Rhizobium + PSB culture kits free

pigeonpeas.name: NFSM-Pulses
pigeonpeas.benefit: Subsidized seeds, cluster front-line demos. MSP ₹7,550/quintal for Arhar

mothbeans.name: NFSM-Pulses
mothbeans.benefit: Subsidized seeds and bio-fertilizer kits for arid zone pulses

kidneybeans.name: NFSM-Pulses
kidneybeans.benefit: Subsidized seeds, INM demos, cold-chain linkage for Rajma

blackgram.name: NFSM-Pulses
blackgram.benefit: Subsidized seeds and integrated nutrient management demos

groundnut.name: NMOOP
groundnut.full_name: National Mission on Oilseeds & Oil Palm
groundnut.benefit: Subsidized breeder seeds, gypsum at 50% cost, sprinkler sets at 50% subsidy

mustard.name: NMOOP
mustard.full_name: National Mission on Oilseeds & Oil Palm

soyabean.name: NMOOP
soyabean.full_name: National Mission on Oilseeds & Oil Palm
soyabean.benefit: Subsidized certified seeds, Rhizobium culture, IPM kits. MSP ₹4,892/quintal

jute.name: JUTE-ICARE
jute.full_name: Jute — Improved Cultivation and Advanced Retting Exercise
jute.benefit: Subsidized certified seeds, nail-weeder, CRIJAF retting tech. MSP ₹5,050/quintal

Maharashtra.name: Namo Shetkari Maha Sanman Nidhi
Maharashtra.benefit: ₹6,000/year state top-up (in addition to PM-KISAN). Total ₹12,000/year

Maharashtra.name: Nanaji Deshmukh Krishi Sanjivani
Maharashtra.benefit: Climate-resilient agriculture project. Free farm ponds, drip irrigation subsidy

Uttar Pradesh.name: UP Kisan Kalyan Mission
Uttar Pradesh.benefit: Free seed mini-kits, soil testing, FPO formation support

Madhya Pradesh.name: Mukhyamantri Kisan Kalyan Yojana
Madhya Pradesh.benefit: ₹4,000/year additional income support on top of PM-KISAN

Rajasthan.name: Free Electricity for Farmers
Rajasthan.benefit: Free electricity for agricultural connections up to 2,000 units

Punjab.name: Crop Diversification Programme
Punjab.benefit: ₹17,500/acre incentive to shift from paddy to maize/cotton/pulses

Haryana.name: Meri Fasal Mera Byora
Haryana.benefit: Online crop registration for MSP procurement. Bonus on wheat/mustard

Tamil Nadu.name: Free Electricity for Agriculture
Tamil Nadu.benefit: Free electricity for all agricultural pumpsets (no metering)

Karnataka.name: Raitha Siri
Karnataka.benefit: Zero-interest crop loans up to ₹3 lakh. Loan waiver for small farmers

Andhra Pradesh.name: YSR Rythu Bharosa
Andhra Pradesh.benefit: ₹13,500/year investment support for farmers (paid in 3 installments)

West Bengal.name: Krishak Bandhu
West Bengal.benefit: ₹10,000/year (₹5,000 per season) for farmers with 1+ acre. ₹2 lakh life insurance

Gujarat.name: Kisan Suryoday Yojana
Gujarat.benefit: Daytime electricity (5 AM to 9 PM) for irrigation. New solar feeder lines

Odisha.name: KALIA
Odisha.full_name: Krushak Assistance for Livelihood and Income Augmentation

Kerala.name: Vegetable & Fruit Promotion Council
Kerala.benefit: Subsidy on seeds, grow bags, precision farming tools. Buy-back guarantee

Jharkhand.name: Mukhyamantri Krishi Ashirwad Yojana
Jharkhand.benefit: ₹5,000/acre (up to 5 acres) per year for Kharif season

Chattisgarh.name: Rajiv Gandhi Kisan Nyay Yojana
Chattisgarh.benefit: ₹9,000/acre input subsidy for paddy, ₹10,000/acre for sugarcane

Bihar.name: Bihar Kisan Samman Yojana
Bihar.benefit: Direct Benefit Transfer for seed, fertilizer, and diesel subsidy

condition_schemes.name: PMKSY Micro Irrigation
condition_schemes.full_name: Per Drop More Crop — Micro Irrigation

condition_schemes.name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana
condition_schemes.benefit: ₹50,000/ha over 3 years for organic farming transition. Free certification
